description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, defines variables BASE_IMAGE_TAG, GO_IMAGE_TAG and PROTOTOOL_VERSION, and sets up three stages: base, language and trigger. In the base stage add a build_base job that runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, then `docker build --build-arg PROTOTOOL_VERSION=$PROTOTOOL_VERSION --tag $BASE_IMAGE_TAG .`, and finally `docker push $BASE_IMAGE_TAG`. In the language stage add a build_go job that runs the same login command, then `docker build --file go.Dockerfile --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=$BASE_IMAGE_TAG --build-arg PROTOTOOL_VERSION=$PROTOTOOL_VERSION --tag $GO_IMAGE_TAG .`, and `docker push $GO_IMAGE_TAG`. In the trigger stage add a trigger_prrepo job that runs a curl POST to https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/8195813/trigger/pipeline with token, ref=master, and variables PROTOTOOL_VERSION and BUILDER_BASE_IMAGE=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, and sets GIT_STRATEGY to none.
